recommendations.title: Audit BRSR P6 Governance Disclosure by 2026-05-15
recommendations.description: Conduct a thorough audit of the BRSR P6 governance disclosures related to the stake divestment to ensure completeness and accuracy ahead of the FY26 filing deadline.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: HDFC Bank FY25 BRSR governance disclosure audit

audit_trail.value: BRSR FY26 Filing deadline 2026-05-30 requires accurate governance disclosures

recommendations.title: Develop Investor FAQ on Stake Divestment by 2026-04-30
recommendations.description: Prepare and disseminate a detailed FAQ document for investors explaining the rationale and governance aspects of the 3.55% stake divestment to maintain stakeholder confidence.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹1 Cr investor-comms budget to support stable market sentiment (scenario)
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Kotak Mahindra Bank investor communication post stake sale

audit_trail.value: Governance disclosures impact investor confidence and market sentiment

recommendations.title: Implement KPI Dashboard for Governance Metrics by 2026-06-15
recommendations.description: Set up a real-time dashboard to monitor governance-related KPIs, including disclosure timeliness and regulatory queries, to proactively manage compliance risks.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹2 Cr cost-avoidance from early detection of disclosure gaps (scenario)
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Axis Bank governance KPI dashboard implementation

audit_trail.value: BRSR emphasizes governance KPI tracking for compliance

recommendations.title: Maintain Regulator Correspondence Log by 2026-07-15
recommendations.description: Establish and maintain a detailed log of all correspondence with SEBI and other regulators regarding the stake divestment to ensure audit readiness and transparency.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹0.3 Cr documentation discipline cost-avoidance over 3 years (scenario)
recommendations.peer_benchmark: ICICI Prudential SEBI correspondence log practice

audit_trail.value: Regulator correspondence documentation supports compliance audit

immediate_low.title: Audit BRSR P6 Governance Disclosure by 2026-05-15
Develop Investor FAQ on Stake Divestment by 2026-04-30

deferred_low.title: Implement KPI Dashboard for Governance Metrics by 2026-06-15
